title: What Scripture actually means when it says put sin to death
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage it. It says put it to death.

Management keeps the sin on a shorter leash. You feel in control — until you don't. Romans 8:13 doesn't say "work on the misdeeds of the body." It says put them to death. By the Spirit. Not willpower. Death.

You don't kill it by trying harder in the same environment. You kill it by cutting off what feeds it. Delete the app. Cancel the subscription. Change the route. The man who restructures his conditions changes the outcome. The one who just resolves harder keeps losing.

Name the exact thing. "I struggle with sin" kills nothing. Name the specific moment it owns you, the exact trigger, and make a plan to starve that exact thing. Vague conviction keeps sin comfortable. Precision is the scalpel.

And then: "Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. One honest brother, one real conversation. Light is the weapon sin can't survive.

Save this for the battle you've been managing instead of winning.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #sin #mortification #christianity #romans8
